tools.name: searchLogs
tools.description: Search service logs by trace id, severity, service, and time window.

tools.name: exportAllLogs
tools.description: Export every log stream for every service and environment.

servers.title: Repository
servers.description: Repository code search and patch preparation.

tools.name: searchCode
tools.description: Search code, tests, owners, and configuration by literal text.

tools.name: deleteRepository
tools.description: Delete repository history, issues, pull requests, branch rules, and settings.

capabilities.title: Investigate Checkout Incident
capabilities.description: Collect logs and source context for a checkout incident without exposing destructive actions.
capabilities.intent: Find the likely failing path and gather evidence for a narrow fix.
capabilities.whenToUse: Use when an agent needs to inspect a checkout production symptom.
examples: Investigate checkout 500s in the last 30 minutes.
